title: ITALY enforcement action against Eni S.p.A. (96,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 96,000 on Eni S.p.A. The controller had been involved in a legal dispute with an NGO that had run a public campaign against them. In an attempt to defend itself publicly, the controller published court documents relating to a lawsuit initiated by the NG...
